title: Send It

writers.lyricist: Austin Mahone/Brandon Green/Dequantes Devontay Lamar/Robert Villanueva/Felix De Laet/Radboud Miedema/Janick Van De Polder
writers.composer: Brandon Green/Joey Lopez/Felix De Laet/Radboud Miedema/Janick Van De Polder

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: You already know I’ll keep it on the low
lyrics.translation: 你知道我将会一直保存它。

lyrics.text: Baby, you can trust me, promise I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的，你可以相信我，我保证我是独自一人知道的，

lyrics.text: I won't tell a soul, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 我不会告诉任何人，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: You already know I keep it on the low
lyrics.translation: 你知道我将会一直保存它。

lyrics.text: Baby, you can trust me, promise I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的，你可以相信我，我保证我是独自一人知道的，

lyrics.text: I won't tell a soul, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 我不会告诉任何人，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: You took it in the mirror, so I could see it clear
lyrics.translation: 你把镜子照向它，所以我可以把它看清楚。

lyrics.text: Baby have no fear, you know it's stayin' here
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的不用怕，你知道它一直在这。

lyrics.text: I know you wanna share, baby might as well
lyrics.translation: 我知道你想分享，亲爱的这也许很好。

lyrics.text: You know I keep it trill, you know I'd never tell
lyrics.translation: 你知道我在保密，你知道我永远不会说出去。

lyrics.text: I'm sure you took a few, slide me one or two
lyrics.translation: 我确信你拍了好几张，在你想做这事的时候。

lyrics.text: I know when that hotline bling, that can only mean one thing
lyrics.translation: 你知道当那电话铃声响起，那只意味着一件事情。

lyrics.text: You know what I like, I've been waitin' on
lyrics.translation: 你知道我喜欢什么，我一直在等待。

lyrics.text: What's takin' so long? Send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 怎么会这么久呢？把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: You already know I keep it on the low
lyrics.translation: 你知道我将会一直保存它。

lyrics.text: Baby, you can trust me, promise I'm alone
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的，你可以相信我，我保证我是独自一人知道的，

lyrics.text: I won't tell a soul, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 我不会告诉任何人，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: Okay now send it to my phone like a message that's unread
lyrics.translation: 好吧，现在发送信息到我的手机里，那会是未读的。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone, new nude picture, open leg
lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，新的裸体图片，打开你的腿。

lyrics.text: Hope they ready
lyrics.translation: 希望他们做好准备。

lyrics.text: Austin Mahone got 'em motivated
lyrics.translation: Austin Mahone他们是对你抱有目的的。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone like a notification
lyrics.translation: 像是发通知一样把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone, but my ringer cut off
lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，这样我的铃声就会切断。

lyrics.text: I can't leave you alone, even though I'm single and I'm
lyrics.translation: 我不能离开你，独自一人，就算我现在单身。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone like a message from my BM
lyrics.translation: 把它像普通短信一样发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: Notify me on my phone like a message in my DM
lyrics.translation: 在手机里通知我，就像一条普通短信。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，把它发送到我的手机里。

lyrics.text: Send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 发送它。

lyrics.translation: 你知道我将会一直保存它。

lyrics.text: I won't tell a soul, send it to my phone
lyrics.translation: 我不会告诉任何人，把它发送到我的手机。

lyrics.text: Baby what's the move? Don't need no attitude
lyrics.translation: 亲爱的你在做什么？不要多想。

lyrics.text: You know it'll stay between just me and you
lyrics.translation: 你知道这件事只有我和你知道。

lyrics.text: I wanna see already, it's the perfect view
lyrics.translation: 我现在很想看，这会是很完美的风景。

lyrics.text: Tell me if you're leavin', can I have it too?
lyrics.translation: 告诉我如果你离开了，我也能拥有它吗？

lyrics.text: Tell you that I love you, yeah, ain't none above you, yeah
lyrics.translation: 我想告诉你，我爱你。耶，没有人能比得上你，耶。

lyrics.text: I wanna see you, babe
lyrics.translation: 我想见你，亲爱的。

lyrics.text: I promise, baby girl, it'll be our little secret, yeah
lyrics.translation: 我保证，我的可爱女孩，那会是个秘密，耶。

lyrics.text: I'm gonna keep it, yeah
lyrics.translation: 我会一直保守秘密，耶。

lyrics.text: Let no one see it, except for me
lyrics.translation: 没有人会看到它，除了我。

lyrics.translation: 把它发送到我的手机里，把它发送到我的手机里。
